title: Well-Known Labels, Annotations and Taints — service.alpha.kubernetes.io/tolerate-unready-endpoints (deprecated)
text:
Type: Annotation
Used on: Service
This annotation was formerly used to indicate that the Endpoints controller
should create Endpoints for unready Pods. Since Kubernetes 1.11, the preferred
API for this feature has been the
.publishNotReadyAddresses
field on the
Service
. This annotation has no effect in
Kubernetes 1.36.
